prerequisites.value: Wis 13, Elemental Fist, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 5th.

description.value: **Benefit:** You gain one additional Elemental Fist attempt per day. While you are in this style, your Elemental Fist attack deals electricity damage. When a creature takes electricity damage from your Elemental Fist attack, you gain a +4 bonus for 1 round on combat maneuver checks to grapple the creature.
